etymology.description: Possibly a variation of Ś£ī(Ś£ī) (zh√Ļ, 'drum') with a modified top part -> evolved into original form of ŚáĪ(ŚáĪ) (k«éi, 'music of triumph') -> phonetic value later used for 'how'
etymology.interpretation: The character may originally depict a type of musical instrument, specifically a drum, with its form adapted and later associated with the meaning 'music of triumph'. It is thought to contribute phonetic value to related characters rather than semantic meaning, later evolving phonetically to express the interrogative 'how'.
